name: @anizoptera/publish-clean
description: Publish pnpm workspace packages from a cleaned, validated package tarball.

scripts.check: bun run format:check && bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build && bun run tracked-artifacts:check && bunx publint && bunx @arethetypeswrong/cli --pack .
scripts.publish:clean: bun run clean && bun run build && node dist/cli.js -- --access public
scripts.test: bun run build && bunx vitest run && bun test test/*.bun.test.ts
